ddls:
CREATE TABLE "landfill_sites" (
  "geodb_oid" INTEGER /* Unique database identifier for each landfill site */,
  "objectid" INTEGER /* Identifier for the object within the database */,
  "globalid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the landfill site */,
  "wrs_site_id" TEXT /* WRS specific site identifier */,
  "mga_b_status" TEXT /* Current status of the landfill (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "mga_b_revised" TEXT /* Date of the last revision to the site status or plan */,
  "mga_b_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the landfill, including development and approval information */,
  "mga_b_approved_by" TEXT /* Person or department that approved the development plan */,
  "shape_area" REAL /* Geographical area of the landfill in square meters */,
  "shape_len" REAL /* Perimeter length of the landfill site in meters */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the landfill site */,
  "operating_since" TEXT /* Date when the landfill site started operating */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last inspection */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the landfill site in cubic meters */,
  "current_occupancy" REAL /* Current occupancy of the landfill site in cubic meters */,
  "waste_types" TEXT /* Types of waste accepted at the landfill site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geodb_oid")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the development plan */,
  "geodb_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the landfill site (geodb_oid) it pertains to */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the development plan */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the plan was submitted for approval */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the plan (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "submitted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who submitted the plan */,
  "planned_capacity_increase" REAL /* Planned increase in capacity (cubic meters) */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the development plan */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the development plan */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected date of plan completion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_plans_geodb_oid FOREIGN KEY ("geodb_oid") REFERENCES landfill_sites ("geodb_oid")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the environmental report */,
  "geodb_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the landfill site (geodb_oid) the report covers */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings in the report */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status with environmental regulations (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "audited_by" TEXT /* Name of the auditor who verified the report */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., Regular, Special) */,
  "inspection_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the inspection */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Detailed findings of the inspection */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Whether follow-up actions are required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date by which follow-up actions should be completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_reports_geodb_oid FOREIGN KEY ("geodb_oid") REFERENCES landfill_sites ("geodb_oid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Auditor, Manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session identifier for the user's session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Administrator, Auditor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
